TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_Maia, title = Maia, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/Maia} }

S.FORM: Maia, Mangacun, Mangacun Itiniay i Namasia Cen no Kaohsiung ko Maia/Mangacun/Mangacun a niyaro', 218 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 788 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 96% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin , polong han i, 757 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 4% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 31 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Bunun 60%, Paiwan 5%, Tayal 3%, Amis 1%, Cou 10%, Hla'alua 7%, Kanakanavu 9%, roma 1%. Ira ko picodadan i niyaro'. Ira ko imeng i niyaro'. Ira ko paisingan i niyaro'. Ira ko kofa i niyaro'.
S.PHON: maia, maŋaʦo~u~un, maŋaʦo~u~un itiniaj i namasia ʦən no~u kao~uħsio~u~uŋ ko~u maia/maŋaʦo~u~un/maŋaʦo~u~un a nijaro~uʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u paro~uɬ~ɮ no~u ɾo~umaʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u tamɬ~ɮaw. **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u jinʦo~umin , po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, *% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u ro~uma a finaʦaɬ~ɮan, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, ** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u kasafinaʦaɬ~ɮan i, ko~u b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un **%, paiwan *%, tajaɾ *%, amis *%, ʦo~uo~u~u **%, ħɾaʡaɾo~u~ua *%, kanakanab~vo~u~u *%, ro~uma *%. ira ko~u piʦo~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮan i nijaro~uʡ. ira ko~u iməŋ i nijaro~uʡ. ira ko~u paisiŋan i nijaro~uʡ. ira ko~u ko~ufa i nijaro~uʡ.
S.FORM: Maia, Mangacun, Mangacun Itiniay i Namasia Cen no Kaohsiung ko Maia/Mangacun/Mangacun a niyaro', 218 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 788 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 96% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin , polong han i, 757 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 4% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 31 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Bunun 60%, Paiwan 5%, Tayal 3%, Amis 1%, Cou 10%, Hla'alua 7%, Kanakanavu 9%, roma 1%. Ira ko picodadan i niyaro'. Ira ko imeng i niyaro'. Ira ko paisingan i niyaro'. Ira ko kofa i niyaro'.
S.PHON: maia, maŋaʦo~u~un, maŋaʦo~u~un itiniaj i namasia ʦən no~u kao~uħsio~u~uŋ ko~u maia/maŋaʦo~u~un/maŋaʦo~u~un a nijaro~uʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u paro~uɬ~ɮ no~u ɾo~umaʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u tamɬ~ɮaw. **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u jinʦo~umin , po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, *% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u ro~uma a finaʦaɬ~ɮan, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, ** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u kasafinaʦaɬ~ɮan i, ko~u b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un **%, paiwan *%, tajaɾ *%, amis *%, ʦo~uo~u~u **%, ħɾaʡaɾo~u~ua *%, kanakanab~vo~u~u *%, ro~uma *%. ira ko~u piʦo~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮan i nijaro~uʡ. ira ko~u iməŋ i nijaro~uʡ. ira ko~u paisiŋan i nijaro~uʡ. ira ko~u ko~ufa i nijaro~uʡ.
